# AGENTS.md

This file is the agent-agnostic alias of [`CLAUDE.md`](./CLAUDE.md), maintained
for compatibility with agents and tools following the [GitHub Spec Kit
convention](https://github.com/github/spec-kit) (Cursor, Cline, Aider,
Continue, Copilot Chat, Codex, etc.).

**The single source of truth is [`CLAUDE.md`](./CLAUDE.md).** Do not edit this
file directly — update `CLAUDE.md` and re-mirror if needed.

> All operational rules, commands, security non-negotiables, and pointers to
> the rest of the documentation are defined in `CLAUDE.md`.
